description: Starter vocabulary for Prosody Lens pattern libraries. Seed patterns are not classifiers until analyst-approved examples are added.

patterns.label: Rising terminal contour
patterns.basis: ToBI-like final rise vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A phrase-like span whose pitch contour rises toward the end.
expected_cues: may have steady or tapering energy

patterns.label: Falling final contour
patterns.basis: ToBI-like final fall vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A phrase-like span whose pitch contour falls toward the end.

patterns.label: Rise-fall focus arc
patterns.basis: pitch-accent contour vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span that rises into a local high point and falls away.
expected_cues: possible loudness peak near the high point

patterns.label: Fall-rise continuation arc
patterns.basis: ToBI/IViE-style continuation vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span that dips and then rises, often useful to inspect for continuation or listing effects.

patterns.label: Level sustained plateau
patterns.basis: descriptive contour vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span with low pitch movement and relatively even loudness.

patterns.label: Energy build emphasis
patterns.basis: intensity contour vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span whose loudness rises even when pitch evidence is weak or unavailable.
expected_cues: pitch may be noisy or absent

patterns.label: Energy taper release
patterns.basis: intensity contour vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span whose loudness tapers, useful for inspecting release or de-emphasis.
expected_cues: pitch may be noisy or absent

patterns.label: Wavy expressive contour
patterns.basis: descriptive contour vocabulary; analyst review required
patterns.description: A span with multiple pitch direction changes and high contour movement.
